_allowlist_note: Optional. Your own never-report domains (township, employer, personal), merged with the built-in brand list. Subdomains are covered automatically, and entries are only skipped when the message is actually authenticated for them (a forged From is still reported).

accounts._note: Gmail requires an App Password (not your Google password): myaccount.google.com/apppasswords. Spam folder is [Gmail]/Spam, not Spam.
